LanguageData.VQE_ArcSite.questDescriptionRules.rulesS: questDescription(asker_factionLeader==True)->[asker_nameFull], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has sent us a message. A group of [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] has occupied the location of an abandoned ARC generator site. The camp is under the control of [siteFaction_name].\n\n[asker_nameDef] is requesting that we clear out the area by eliminating all enemies and defenses. Once the site is secured, we will have the opportunity to study the ARC generator and recover valuable ARC components. [asker_label] also says that [sitePart0_description].

questDescription(askerIsNull==true)->We have received information that an old ARC generator site has been taken over by [siteFaction_pawnsPlural] from [siteFaction_name]. The bandits have fortified their position and are using the location as a hideout.\n\nSecuring the site will allow us to examine the generator for any remaining research data and salvageable ARC components. Be prepared for resistance, as the site is likely heavily guarded. Additionally, [sitePart0_description].
sitePart0_description->the site is partially overgrown, with many of its original structures crumbling from age
sitePart0_description->the bandits have fortified the site with makeshift defenses and traps
sitePart0_description->the ARC generator is visibly damaged but still holds valuable salvage
sitePart0_description->the site appears to be a mix of old ruins and hastily built bandit encampments
sitePart0_description->hostile patrols have been seen guarding the perimeter
sitePart0_description->the bandits are using the generator to power their crude operations
LanguageData.VQE_ArcSite.root.nodes.0.nodes.0.name: askerIsNull
LanguageData.VQE_ArcSite.root.nodes.2.node.nodes.0.te: The bandit camp has packed up and moved on. The quest [resolvedQuestName] has expired.
LanguageData.VQE_ArcSite.root.nodes.3.node.nodes.0.te: After being discovered, the bandit camp has dispersed. The quest [resolvedQuestName] has ended.
LanguageData.VQE_ArcSite.root.nodes.4.node.nodes.1.no: You have defeated the bandit camp!\n\nThe payment from [asker_faction_name] has arrived.
